name: Modern Bath Canister Black - Threshold™
description: Keep your bath space neat and organized with the Bath Canister from Threshold™. This decorative bath canister is great for storing anything from cotton balls, makeup accessories and other vanity essentials, ensuring your bathroom counters or vanity top keep free of clutter. Featuring a minimalist design and solid color, it seamlessly blends with your bathroom decor while adding sleek modern style and functionality.
